query:
INSERT INTO posts (title, slug, excerpt, content, pillar, author, status, readTime, contentType, audienceType, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES

-- SECTION 1: HISTORICAL SILENCE & CREDIBILITY (1-10)
('Where the Church Was Silent', 'where-church-was-silent', 'A reckoning with the history of silence during slavery, Jim Crow, and civil rights. The church''s institutional interests created powerful incentives for silence.', 'The church in America has a history that is not primarily the history of courage and faithfulness. It is, in significant stretches, a history of silence in the face of injustice. The silence during chattel slavery, Jim Crow, and the civil rights movement reveals a pattern of institutional self-preservation over prophetic faithfulness.', 'Prophetic Justice', 'James Bell', 1, 8, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Justice Is Not a Political Category', 'justice-not-political', 'Justice appears 400+ times in the OT. It describes God''s character and what God requires. The prophets announced justice as theology, not politics.', 'The word "justice" came to be heard in many evangelical contexts as a political term. This inversion is theological error of the most significant kind. Mishpat describes God''s own character, God''s activity in history, and the specific disposition that God requires of God''s people.', 'Prophetic Justice', 'James Bell', 1, 7, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Complicity Is Not Innocence', 'complicity-not-innocence', 'Silence in the face of injustice is not neutrality. It is a specific moral choice with specific moral consequences.', 'The comfortable Christian position in a culture with genuine injustice is neither endorsement nor active resistance. It is something more subtle and more convenient: the claim of non-involvement. This position presents itself as principled. It is, on examination, a specific kind of complicity.', 'Prophetic Justice', 'James Bell', 1, 8, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('The Poor Are Not a Ministry Category', 'poor-not-ministry', 'They are the test of the church. Matthew 25 reveals where the risen Christ is to be found.', 'The biblical position on the poor is not ambiguous. It is among the most consistently stated themes in the entire canon of Scripture. The test of genuine Christian devotion is not the quality of the worship service. It is the quality of the care for the vulnerable.', 'Prophetic Justice', 'James Bell', 1, 7, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Creation Care Is Not Optional', 'creation-care-not-optional', 'Environmental stewardship is embedded in the creation mandate and the prophetic tradition.', 'Creation care is not an optional add-on to Christian faith but central to God''s purposes. The church that preaches about God''s creation while being indifferent to its destruction has separated theology from reality.', 'Prophetic Justice', 'James Bell', 1, 6, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('The Widow, the Orphan, the Stranger', 'widow-orphan-stranger', 'These three categories appear throughout Scripture as the specific focus of God''s justice concern.', 'These three categories—the widow, the orphan, the stranger—appear repeatedly throughout Scripture as the specific focus of God''s justice concern. They represent the vulnerable, the powerless, the ones without advocate or protection.', 'Prophetic Justice', 'James Bell', 1, 7, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Mishpat and Tsedaqah', 'mishpat-tsedaqah', 'Understanding the Hebrew words that describe God''s justice and righteousness.', 'Mishpat and tsedaqah are the two Hebrew words that describe God''s justice and righteousness. Mishpat is the active work of justice. Tsedaqah is the right relationship that results from justice. Together they describe God''s character and what God requires.', 'Prophetic Justice', 'James Bell', 1, 6, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('What Micah 6:8 Actually Demands', 'micah-6-8-demands', '"Act justly, love mercy, walk humbly" is not optional advice but the core requirement of following God.', 'He has shown you, O mortal, what is good. And what does the LORD require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God. This is not optional advice. It is the core requirement of following God.', 'Prophetic Justice', 'James Bell', 1, 7, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('The Church Has a Credibility Problem', 'church-credibility-problem', 'The cost of silence is the loss of credibility with the very people the church claims to care about.', 'The church known, among the people it claims to care about, for its silence when they needed its voice has sacrificed something very difficult to recover—the credibility that comes from being genuinely trustworthy in the moments that matter.', 'Prophetic Justice', 'James Bell', 1, 8, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Why Racial Reconciliation Without Repentance Is Just Branding', 'racial-reconciliation-without-repentance', 'Genuine reconciliation requires material restitution, not just spiritual apologies.', 'Racial reconciliation without repentance is just branding. Genuine reconciliation requires material restitution, not just spiritual apologies. The church that advocates forgiveness without engaging the question of restitution has received only half the biblical witness.', 'Prophetic Justice', 'James Bell', 1, 8, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW());

logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 1: Unknown column 'content' in 'field list'
